PRO TEM JUDGE:ROBERT LIU/CLERK:ECLAVERIA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL STEPHEN M. KAPPOS, AND DEFT PRESENT AND IN PROPER. CASE NOT SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, RANDALL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1225 WEBSTER STREET, S.F. $1,359.00 RENT, $375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,109.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-01-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS EQUAL $ 750 TO BE PAID MONTHLY ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH ($75 PER MONTH) WITH THE CURRENT MONTHLY RENT BEGINNING FEB 1, 1997. PRINCIPAL OF $ 1,359 IS TO BE PAID ON JAN 17, 1997 BEFORE 5PM. IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH ALL OF THE TERMS, THEN PLTF SHALL DISMISS THE CASE.
